Reason: The power cut affecting your property has been caused by an unexpected problem with the cables or equipment that serve your area. If you need to report an emergency, please call 105
CustomerStageSequenceMessage: Our team are now on site and are working to fix the problem.
CustomETRMessage:
We’re sorry that your power has been interrupted again. Our engineers and our generator provider are on their way to site and are expected to arrive at approximately 7:30 PM. We will send a further update by text message as soon as more information is available.
We understand you have experienced several power cuts recently, and we want to reassure you that repairs are underway, once complete we will remove the generator and return you to you to our network.
